---
title: "Mary Louisa Molesworth"
---

## Mary Louisa Molesworth

**Dates:** (1842-1921)

**Maiden name:** (Stewart)

### Description

novelist and children’s writer, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1886)

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 8th 1886
- Letter from February 26 [1886]
- Letter from Novr 9th [1885] 
- Letter from Sept 8th [?1880-1888]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
